headline: Schwab’s Beatty Says Expanding Wealth Advice Not at Risk of ‘Bumping Into’ RIAs
summary: Jon Beatty, Schwab’s head of advisor service, made the comment after news that its Schwab Wealth Advisory offices would be expanding from 20 to 30 markets.

headline: HOOD Brings AI Agents to Trading and Spending: Opportunity or Risk?
summary: Robinhood rolls out AI agents for trading and Gold Card spending, adding safeguards, yet raising worries about errors, fraud and regulation.
